hero.subtitle: GRVT MES is a lightweight, cloud-based Manufacturing Execution System built for SMEs that want real production control — without ERP complexity.

about.hero_subtitle: A global Electronic Manufacturing Services (EMS) company with roots in Europe and a presence across three continents.
about.what_we_do_title: From Design File to Finished Product.
about.what_we_do_desc_1: Dannie provides end-to-end electronics manufacturing services — from PCB assembly and component sourcing to full system integration and box builds.
about.what_we_do_desc_2: Whether you're launching a first prototype or scaling to tens of thousands of units, we deliver with the same standard: full traceability, zero surprises.
about.goal_desc: To become the world's most reliable and transparent manufacturing partner for hardware companies — removing uncertainty from the supply chain, one build at a time.
about.vision_desc: A future where every hardware company — from a two-person startup to a global OEM — can build with Certainty.

quality.title: Quality Control
quality.desc: AOI, X-ray, ICT, and functional testing

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: We believe every stakeholder deserves full visibility into what happens on our floor.

precision.title: Precision
precision.desc: We hold ourselves to zero-defect standards—not as a goal, but as a baseline expectation.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.desc: We treat our customers as co-builders. Your product roadmap is our roadmap.

globalness.title: Globalness
globalness.desc: Rooted in Europe, scaled globally. We bring the best of every region to every build.

about.team_desc: A cross-continental team of engineers, operators, and innovators — united by a single obsession: quality.

ceo.name: Dannie CEO
ceo.desc: Visionary leader driving Dannie's mission to bring transparency and precision to global electronics manufacturing.

ops.name: Operations Lead
ops.desc: Orchestrates our three-hub global manufacturing network, ensuring seamless production from prototype to mass delivery.

eng.name: Engineering Director
eng.desc: Leads our cross-functional engineering squads across Lithuania, Turkey, and China with a relentless focus on quality.

innovation.name: Innovation Lead
innovation.desc: Drives the digital transformation and technology partnerships that keep Dannie at the forefront of smart manufacturing.

about.cta_desc: Let's talk about your project. Our team is ready to take it from schematic to shipment.

solutions.title: Built to Solve
solutions.subtitle: SME electronics manufacturers are not served well by monolithic MES or by spreadsheets. We target the "Excel Gap" by delivering rapid, role-specific solutions that directly eliminate your biggest chaotic problems.

mats.title: Material Intelligence
mats.desc: UID-based reels, MSL, and paste lifecycle tracking with label printing and smart storage integration.
mats.prob_desc: Phantom inventory and manual counts erode planning. We restore confidence with real-time stock updates.

safety.title: Process Safety & Interlocks
safety.desc: Feeder setup verification, splice capture, and process interlocks to stop errors at the tool.
safety.prob_desc: Manual data entry causes avoidable errors. We reduce mistakes at the source.

connectivity.title: Open Connectivity
connectivity.desc: IPC-CFX & Hermes-ready architecture to connect machines, counters, and analytics without costly drivers.
connectivity.prob_desc: Multiple spreadsheets and point tools create friction. We consolidate data and automate material flows.

trace.title: Trace & As-Built
trace.desc: As-built genealogy, digital work instructions, and audit-ready traceability for regulated sectors.
trace.prob_desc: Without traceability, recalls and audits are expensive. As-built genealogy puts you in control.

phases.title: Your Factory Keeps Running
phases.subtitle: Even When Office Systems Go Down
phases.big_idea_desc: If your ERP system goes offline (server crash, network outage, ransomware attack), your factory floor should keep producing for at least 24 hours. Here's how we make that happen:

c1.title: Keep Office and Factory Apart
c1.std: Office computers and factory machines should not live on the same network. We keep them safely separated.
c1.ben: If someone clicks a bad email, production keeps running. Machines stay safe.

c2.title: A Safe Middle Stop
c2.std: Information doesn’t go straight from the office to the factory. It passes through a safe checkpoint first.
c2.ben: Only clean, approved data reaches your machines. Bad stuff gets blocked.

c3.title: Vendor Access Only When Needed
c3.std: Vendors get temporary access, only during scheduled work. It turns off automatically.
c3.ben: No forgotten logins. No hidden back doors. Just controlled access.

c4.title: Daily System Checkups
c4.std: Every day we compare office numbers with factory results and save backups.
c4.ben: Problems show up early. Fix them before they become expensive.

cta_banner.title: Ready to Control Your Factory Floor?
cta_banner.subtitle: Launch GRVT MES Core in minutes.

footer.tagline: Lightweight manufacturing execution system built for SMEs.

why.title: Why MES Systems Get Messy
why.subtitle: If this sounds familiar, you are not alone.

card_1.title: Too Many Systems, Nothing Talks
card_1.desc: Every new tool creates more chaos. One change breaks three others.

card_2.title: Nobody Trusts the Numbers
card_2.desc: Every system shows different data. Meetings turn into arguments.

card_3.title: Your Factory Is One Click Away From Disaster
card_3.desc: Office IT and production machines share the same network.

card_4.title: Humans Typing Data Always Fails
card_4.desc: Manual input means errors, delays, and lost money.
